title: Go Goa Gone
tmdbOverview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.
synopsis: Go Goa Gone (2013) is a comedy and horror film from India. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a A certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
